ecarx.carext.security.biometrics.face

Interface IFaceManager.AuthenticationCallback

  • Enclosing interface:
    IFaceManager

    public static interface IFaceManager.AuthenticationCallback
    Callback structure provided to IFaceManager.authenticate(CancellationSignal, AuthenticationCallback, Handler, String). Users of this must provide an implementation of this for listening to face events.
    Since:
    6

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void onAuthenticationAcquired(int acquireInfo)
      Called when a face image has been acquired, but wasn't processed yet.
      void onAuthenticationError(int errorCode, java.lang.CharSequence errString)
      Called when an unrecoverable error has been encountered and the operation is complete.
      void onAuthenticationFailed()
      Called when a face is detected but not recognized.
      void onAuthenticationHelp(int helpCode, java.lang.CharSequence helpString)
      Called when a recoverable error has been encountered during authentication.
      void onAuthenticationSucceeded(java.lang.String userId)
      Called when a face is recognized.

    • Method Detail

      • onAuthenticationError

        void onAuthenticationError(int errorCode,
                           @NonNull
                           java.lang.CharSequence errString)
        Called when an unrecoverable error has been encountered and the operation is complete. No further callbacks will be made on this object.
        Parameters:
        errorCode - An integer identifying the error message
        errString - A human-readable error string that can be shown in UI
        Since:
        6

      • onAuthenticationHelp

        void onAuthenticationHelp(int helpCode,
                          @NonNull
                          java.lang.CharSequence helpString)
        Called when a recoverable error has been encountered during authentication. The help string is provided to give the user guidance for what went wrong, such as "Sensor dirty, please clean it."
        Parameters:
        helpCode - An integer identifying the error message
        helpString - A human-readable string that can be shown in UI
        Since:
        6

      • onAuthenticationSucceeded

        void onAuthenticationSucceeded(@NonNull
                               java.lang.String userId)
        Called when a face is recognized.
        Parameters:
        userId - userId to authenticate for(not UserHandle.getUserId)
        Since:
        6

      • onAuthenticationFailed

        void onAuthenticationFailed()
        Called when a face is detected but not recognized.
        Since:
        6

      • onAuthenticationAcquired

        void onAuthenticationAcquired(int acquireInfo)
        Called when a face image has been acquired, but wasn't processed yet.
        Parameters:
        acquireInfo - one of FACE_ACQUIRED_* constants
        Since:
        6
